mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO factor_daily (symbol, trade_date, ma5, ma20, ma60, rsi14, atr14, adx, volume_ma20, ma60_up, is_volume_break) VALUES
(#{item.symbol}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.ma5}, #{item.ma20}, #{item.ma60}, #{item.rsi14}, #{item.atr14}, #{item.adx}, #{item.volumeMa20}, #{item.ma60Up}, #{item.isVolumeBreak})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ma5 = VALUES(ma5), ma20 = VALUES(ma20), ma60 = VALUES(ma60), rsi14 = VALUES(rsi14), atr14 = VALUES(atr14), adx = VALUES(adx), volume_ma20 = VALUES(volume_ma20), ma60_up = VALUES(ma60_up), is_volume_break = VALUES(is_volume_break)
